default_ideas.name: Web and API tell the same story
default_ideas.description: Every number a user sees on the site must match the API response. If health says ok but the page looks broken, trust is gone. Verified by automated parity checks between GET /api/ideas and the /ideas page.

open_questions.question: Which pages and endpoints most need to match for a first-time user to trust the product?
open_questions.answer: Three pairs: (1) GET /api/health → web landing page status indicator — if the health check says ok but the site looks broken, trust is gone instantly. (2) GET /api/ideas → /ideas page — the portfolio ranking must match the API ordering (free_energy_score descending). (3) GET /api/ideas/{id} → /portfolio detail — actual_value, potential_value, and value_gap must render the same numbers the API returns. These three are the minimum trust surface.

open_questions.question: What is the smallest start-to-finish path we should keep working every time?
open_questions.answer: The minimum e2e flow (spec 051): POST /api/value-lineage/links → POST /api/value-lineage/{id}/usage-events → GET /api/value-lineage/{id}/valuation → POST /api/value-lineage/{id}/payout-preview. This proves idea → spec → implementation → value → payout works end-to-end. Tested in test_value_lineage.py::test_minimum_e2e_flow_endpoint.

default_ideas.name: One place to see what every idea costs, delivers, and should do next
default_ideas.description: A single DB (data/coherence.db) stores all ideas, specs, evidence, and metrics with content hashes linking to source files. No duplicate sources, no conflicting numbers. Verified by scripts/verify_hashes.py.

open_questions.question: What are the clearest signs that an idea is moving from promise to real results?
open_questions.answer: Five observable signals from spec 116: (1) value_realization_pct rising (actual_value / potential_value), (2) computed_confidence increasing as data sources report real numbers, (3) manifestation_status transitioning none → partial → validated, (4) lineage_measured_value > 0, (5) runtime_event_count growing. All computed from observable data, not hand-typed.

default_ideas.name: Help local projects show funders they are real
default_ideas.description: A funder should verify a project in under 60 seconds: does it run, does it deliver value, who built it. Three API calls assemble this proof automatically. No pitch deck needed — the data speaks.

open_questions.question: What is the smallest proof a funder needs before taking a first meeting?
open_questions.answer: A single-page proof from 3 API calls: (1) GET /api/ideas/{id} showing manifestation_status partial/validated with actual_value > 0 — proves real delivery. (2) GET /api/ideas/{id}/grounded-metrics showing lineage_measured_value > 0 and runtime_event_count > 0 — proves adoption. (3) GET /api/value-lineage/{id}/payout-preview showing contributor attribution — proves a real team. Verifiable in under 60 seconds.

open_questions.question: Which first three projects are ready to share a clear ask this month?
open_questions.answer: The Coherence Network itself is the first project: it has 118 specs, 306 evidence records, grounded metrics, and a working value lineage pipeline. The proof page (funder-proof-page child idea) can be generated from its own API. The second and third projects depend on onboarding partners who run federated instances — blocked on the federated-instance-aggregation idea reaching partial status.

default_ideas.name: Replace placeholder numbers with real measurements
default_ideas.description: Every metric in the system should come from observable data: provider billing for cost, usage events for value, commit evidence for progress. Spec 115 and 116 implement the grounded metrics pipeline. Verified by 37 tests in test_grounded_idea_metrics.py.

open_questions.question: What is the smallest real data feed that would make these signals feel trustworthy?
open_questions.answer: Three feeds implemented: (1) provider-reported cost from OpenRouter billing (agent_execution_service.py), (2) value from lineage usage events (value_lineage_service.py), (3) confidence from 5-source weighted coverage (grounded_idea_metrics_service.py). All operational since 2026-03-18.

default_ideas.name: Let partners run their own copy and safely share results
default_ideas.description: A partner runs a local Coherence instance, does real work, and sends LineageLinks + UsageEvents to the network. The receiving instance re-computes valuations locally — no trust required, just verifiable math. Governance voting prevents unilateral ranking changes.

open_questions.question: What is the smallest federation contract two instances need to safely share results?
open_questions.answer: Three models form the minimum contract: (1) LineageLink (idea_id, spec_id, implementation_refs, contributors, estimated_cost) — attributed work unit. (2) UsageEvent (lineage_id, source, metric, value, captured_at) — measured value unit. (3) LineageValuation (measured_value_total, estimated_cost, roi_ratio, event_count) — computed outcome. Remote sends links + events; local re-computes valuation to verify. Payouts use deterministic coherence-weighted formula.

open_questions.question: What proof should we require before shared results change rankings or decisions?
open_questions.answer: Remote results arrive as a governance ChangeRequest (IDEA_UPDATE or SPEC_UPDATE) requiring local approval. Any rejection vetoes immediately. Approval threshold is configurable (1-10 votes, default 1). free_energy_score recomputes only after approval+apply. No remote instance can unilaterally change local prioritization.

coherence-network-agent-pipeline.name: Agent pipeline: visible, recoverable, and self-healing
coherence-network-agent-pipeline.description: The background work loop picks tasks, executes them, records results, and heals when stuck. Observable via telemetry dashboard, recoverable via auto-heal, measurable via grounded metrics.

coherence-network-api-runtime.name: API and live system stay in sync
coherence-network-api-runtime.description: Every endpoint returns data that matches what the system actually computes at runtime. No stale caches, no diverged state between API responses and internal models.

coherence-network-value-attribution.name: Show exactly how value flows from idea to contributor
coherence-network-value-attribution.description: Lineage links connect ideas → specs → implementations → usage events → valuations → payouts. Every step is auditable. Spec 048 and 115 implement the pipeline, 37 tests verify it.

coherence-network-web-interface.name: Web interface shows live data, not stale snapshots
coherence-network-web-interface.description: The Next.js frontend reads from the same API endpoints that agents and scripts use. No separate data path, no hand-maintained dashboards.

deployment-gate-reliability.name: Catch broken releases before users see them
deployment-gate-reliability.description: CI runs 833+ tests, health checks verify on deploy, and the agent pipeline detects drift between expected and actual behavior. Recovery is documented and scripted.

interface-trust-surface.name: 3 critical web-API pairs that must always match
interface-trust-surface.description: health→landing, ideas-list→/ideas, idea-detail→/portfolio. If any pair disagrees, a first-time user sees a broken product. Parity is verifiable by comparing API JSON to rendered page data.

minimum-e2e-path.name: The 4-step proof that value flows end-to-end
minimum-e2e-path.description: create-lineage-link → record-usage-event → compute-valuation → payout-preview. If this path breaks, nothing downstream works. Tested in test_value_lineage.py::test_minimum_e2e_flow_endpoint (spec 051).

funder-proof-page.name: 60-second funder verification from 3 API calls
funder-proof-page.description: A single page assembles: (1) project status + actual_value from /ideas/{id}, (2) adoption signals from /ideas/{id}/grounded-metrics, (3) team attribution from /value-lineage/{id}/payout-preview. No pitch deck — the data is the proof.

idea-hierarchy-model.name: Super-ideas vs. child-ideas: strategic goals vs. actionable work
idea-hierarchy-model.description: idea_type (super/child/standalone) and parent_idea_id added to the Idea model. Super-ideas set direction but never appear in task pickup. Child-ideas are what agents actually execute. Spec 117, 24 tests.

unified-sqlite-store.name: Single DB committed to git as source of truth
unified-sqlite-store.description: data/coherence.db stores all ideas, specs, evidence, and metrics. Content stays in files (markdown, JSON) linked by SHA-256 hashes. No runtime bootstrap, no duplicate sources. scripts/verify_hashes.py catches drift. Spec 118.
